title: Tod's Amendment
content:
The World hath set its heavy yoke
Upon the old white-bearded folk
Who strive to please the King.
God's mercy is upon the young,
God's wisdom in the baby tongue
That fears not anything.
meaning:
Rudyard Kipling's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Tod's Amendment"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
